news.t: S&P 500 Momentum Continued Its Dominant Run in May
3 Ways to Play the S&P 500 Based on Your Risk Tolerance
High-Quality Stocks Fumbled Without AI. Own Them Anyway.
One chipmaker could be best bet to ride high-beta rally, technician says
The trade war seems to be losing its power to frighten this resilient stock market

holdings.infoBox: SPHB is an equity ETF with a total of 103 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 2.45%, Micron Technology at 1.97%, Robinhood Markets at 1.91%, Lam Research at 1.66%, and KLA Corporation at 1.55%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 500 High Beta ETF (SPHB) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 High Beta index. The fund tracks a beta-weighted index of the 100 highest-beta stocks in the S&P 500. SPHB was launched on May 5, 2011 and is issued by Invesco.
